sections.title: When giving the forester an egg

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have an egg for you.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Hey, [player name], can you help me with some pheasants?

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Collect the eggs from the uninhabited nests and bring them to me, and I'll reward you.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Well, come back if you change your mind.

sections.title: When the Pheasant Control event is almost over

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: These pheasants will be finding new nesting grounds soon.
